title: After the Mile Championship: High-Key Happy

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has a great race and beats
Daitaku Helios! Afterward, the two promise to
race each other again one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship comes to a close with an
unexpected invitation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios invites Matikanetannhauser to her
post-loss pick-me-up party.
